code-runner.executorMap.cpp: cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; g++ "$fileName" -o "build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" ; if ($?) { .\build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe }
code-runner.executorMap.java: cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; javac -d build "$fileName" ; if ($?) { java -cp build "$fileNameWithoutExt" }
code-runner.executorMap.go: cd $dir ; if (-not (Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build' | Out-Null } ; go build -o "build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe" "$fileName" ; if ($?) { .\build\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe }
